failedAssertions.reason: Live base64 vision request returned HTTP 200 but the assistant said no image was attached instead of grounding the response in the PNG content.
Live base64 image request returned HTTP 200 but the assistant said no actual image file was attached, so the response was not image-grounded.

appliedUpdates.description: Added flow-validator guidance for runtime-compat startup refresh persistence and shared live API curl validation, including isolation rules, evidence expectations, and vision/tool-use request guidance.
